name: Weather Display
description: Look up simulated current weather by city name
backend_requirements: Access control: allow public read-only weather lookups; require auth for cache management
1. WeatherCache model: id, city (required), temperature, condition, fetched_at, expires_at, is_active
2. GET /api/weather?city=NAME - return simulated weather data; use cached result when fresh (within 5 minutes), otherwise generate new simulated data
3. Simulated weather: pick a random realistic temperature (-10 to 40 C) and a random condition from: Sunny, Cloudy, Rainy, Windy, Snowy, Foggy, Partly Cloudy, Thunderstorm
5. Validate: city is required and max 100 chars; return 400 if missing
6. Do NOT call any external weather API - generate all data programmatically
frontend_requirements: Public guest weather search with CTA to sign in for cache management
1. Search input for city with 'Search' button
2. Weather card showing city, temperature (C and F), condition, last updated
5. Units toggle (C/F) — display-only conversion, no extra API call

api_endpoints.description: Get simulated weather by city (?city=NAME); returns cached if fresh

admin_requirements: 1. Admin overview list with total/active/inactive counts
2. Toggle active status for any cached entry

admin_api_endpoints.description: Admin overview: list all cache entries and counts
